heading: Awards to former employees
label: 4505 Awards to former employees
text: An agency may pay or grant an award under this subchapter notwithstanding the death or separation from the service of the employee concerned, if the suggestion, invention, superior accomplishment, other personal effort, or special act or service in the public interest for which the award is proposed was made or performed while the employee was in the employ of the Government.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2123(c)§ 304(c), .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 120868 Stat. 1113The words “or grant” are added for clarity.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
